response.text:

rationale: r3c3's SoC (35% frac) falls below your 50% threshold and urgency is normal; accepting maintains reciprocal goodwill while your conservative policy still preserves adequate margin given grid scarcity conditions.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Grid-wide scarcity detected; r3c2 SoC critically low at 45.7%. Neighbors r2c2, r3c3, r4c2 have accepted prior requests but energy not yet received—prioritize incoming offers. Conservative sharing to preserve minimum operating margin while maintaining reciprocal relationships..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
